analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒波動，受人工智慧恐慌和伊朗戰爭影響。蘋果股價下跌 3.64%，NVIDIA 股價跌幅達 16%。中國五月份批發通膨率創近四年新高，主要受全球商品成本大幅上漲和中東戰爭干擾能源及原材料供應的影響。美國將公布今年第三季度的CPI通膨率數據，市場預期通膨率將繼續上升。OpenAI 考慮租用俄亥俄州資料中心，NVIDIA 提供支持。

【結語】
今日市場情緒波動，投資者應該保持冷靜和謹慎。投資人應該關注超級計算機公司在七月財報電話會的資本支出指南。同時，投資者應該注意社會安全退休金信託基金可能於2032年耗盡的風險。投資者應該保持多元化投資組合，避免過度集中於任何一隻股票。

【精選個股】
NVDA - NVIDIA - 人工智慧需求大幅上升，公司股價下跌可能是買入機會。
TSM - 台積電 - 公司在人工智慧領域的投資將為未來業務提供強大動力。
AAPL - 蘋果 - 公司的新AI功能預計將比投資人預期的更快地被盈利化，主要是由於硬件需求的增加和新的「殺手級」應用程式。
AMD - AMD - 公司在人工智慧領域的投資將為未來業務提供強大動力。

風險提醒：投資人應該注意公司的財務狀況和市場情緒的波動，避免過度投資於任何一隻股票。

items.title: Bank of America sends clear message on Apple stock after key event
items.summary: Apple shares fell 3.64% on June 9 after the company's annual Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) failed to deliver the major surprises some investors were hoping for. WWDC is Apple's important event of the year, where the company usually unveils updates to iOS, macOS, iPadOS, and other products. ...
items.zh_title: 銀行美聯將對蘋果股價發出明確訊息
items.zh_point: 銀行美聯在蘋果的年度全球開發者大會（WWDC）未能滿足投資者期待後，蘋果股價下跌3.64%。該公司的WWDC是年度重要活動，通常會公布iOS、macOS、iPadOS等產品的更新內容。

items.title: Why Apple (AAPL) Shares Are Sliding Today
items.summary: Shares of iPhone and iPad maker Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) fell 3.3% in the afternoon session after the WWDC keynote did not deliver the kind of AI leap many investors had been positioning for.
items.zh_title: 為什麼蘋果股價今天下跌
items.zh_point: 蘋果股價下跌3.3%，因為WWDC演講未能達到投資人對人工智能的期望。

items.title: OpenAI weighs leasing Ohio data center with Nvidia backing, The Information reports
items.summary: OpenAI is ‌in negotiations ‌to lease a ​proposed 10-gigawatt data center campus on federal ‌land ⁠in Ohio, in a ⁠deal that could include ​financial ​backing ​from Nvidia, ‌The Information reported on Tuesday, citing two people with ‌direct ​knowledge ​of ​the discussions. Reuters ‌could not immediately ​verify ​the report.
items.zh_title: OpenAI 考慮租用 Ohio 資料中心，Nvidia 會提供財務支持
items.zh_point: OpenAI 正在與 Ohio 政府談判租用一座 10-gigawatt 的資料中心，Nvidia 可能會提供財務支持。

items.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall On Iran News After Market Whipsaws; CPI Inflation On Tap
items.summary: The stock market had a wild Tuesday, skidding but also coming off lows on AI fears and Trump's Iran threats. CPI inflation is on tap.
items.zh_title: 道瓊指數未來下跌 因伊朗新聞市場大幅波動；CPI通膨率即將公布
items.zh_point: 道瓊指數在周二大幅波動，先是下跌後又回升，受人工智慧恐慌和特朗普對伊朗威脅的影響。同時，美國將公布今年第三季度的CPI通膨率數據。

items.title: SMH ETF Investors: Watch Hyperscaler Capex Guidance at July Earnings Calls
items.summary: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (NYSEARCA:SMH) closed Friday at $599, capping a stretch in which SMH has returned roughly 146% over the past year and tacked on nearly 20% in May alone. SMH is up about 66% year to date, and the rally has been driven less by NVIDIA than most holders assume. Because the fund ... SMH ETF Investors: Watch Hyperscaler Capex Guidance at July Earnings Calls
items.zh_title: SMH ETF 投資者：注意超級計算機公司資本支出指南在七月財報電話會
items.zh_point: VanEck 半導體 ETF (NYSEARCA:SMH) 在上週五收盤價為 599 美元，近一年內 SMH 回報約 146%，五月份單月回報近 20%。截至目前，SMH 年內回報約 66%，這波行情主要不是由 NVIDIA驅動。因為這個 ETF 的組成，投資者應該關注超級計算機公司在七月財報電話會的資本支出指南。

items.title: China May wholesale inflation hits near 4-year high on Iran war, AI costs; CPI misses
items.summary: Price growth has been boosted by a surge in global commodity costs, as the Middle East conflict disrupted energy and raw material flows.
items.zh_title: 中國五月份批發通膨率近四年高點受伊朗戰爭、AI成本影響；CPI未達預期
items.zh_point: 中國五月份批發通膨率創近四年新高，主要受全球商品成本大幅上漲和中東戰爭干擾能源及原材料供應的影響。

items.title: Oil choppy after U.S. completes Iran strikes following Apache helicopter attack
items.summary: Oil prices rose after the U.S. launched military strikes against Iran, raising concerns that renewed clashes may threaten shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
items.zh_title: 美軍對伊朗進行空襲後石油價格波動不定
items.zh_point: 美國對伊朗進行軍事打擊，石油價格因此上升，擔心伊朗與美國之間的衝突可能威脅霍爾木茲海峽的航運安全。

items.title: U.S. military launches strikes in retaliation for Iran downing helicopter
items.summary: The latest clash with Iran over the Strait of Hormuz came as President Donald Trump repeated that a deal with Tehran could be reached within days.
items.zh_title: 美國軍方對伊朗擊落直升機報復發動空襲
items.zh_point: 美國軍方對伊朗擊落一架直升機作出回應，同時美國總統唐納德·川普再次表示，與伊朗達成協議可能在幾天內完成。

items.title: Social Security retirement trust fund may be depleted in 2032, new trustees report finds
items.summary: The Social Security Administration has released a report with new projections as to when the trust funds that help pay benefits may be depleted.
items.zh_title: 社會安全退休金信託基金可能於2032年耗盡，新的監管人報告發現
items.zh_point: 社會安全局最新報告預估信託基金可能於2032年耗盡，可能影響退休金支付。

items.title: Republican Steve Hilton advances to general election in race for California governor
items.summary: Republican Steve Hilton has advanced to the general election for California governor after making the case that the state desperately needs new leadership following more than 15 years of Democratic dominance.
items.zh_title: 共和黨人史蒂夫·希爾頓進入加州州長大選
items.zh_point: 共和黨人史蒂夫·希爾頓在加州州長選舉中成功晉級大選，認為該州需要新領導人來取代民主黨長達15年以上的統治。

items.title: Oracle’s stock has surged on AI hype. Now it has to deliver the earnings to match.
items.summary: Oracle’s fourth-quarter earnings call will deliver critical updates about the progress of its data-center build-out and the financial impact of its AI pivot.
items.zh_title: 甲骨文股價大幅上漲，現在要交出實現AI夢想的業績報告
items.zh_point: 甲骨文即將公布第四季財報，將透露其數據中心擴建進展和AI轉型的財務影響。該公司的股價因AI熱潮而大幅上漲，但現在需要通過財報來實現這一成就。

items.title: This proposed federal budget cut could eliminate job training for 42,000 vulnerable seniors
items.summary: A job-training program for low-income older adults is set to lose funding under President Donald Trump’s proposed budget for 2027 — just as more stringent work requirements for food aid and healthcare coverage go into effect.
items.zh_title: 川普總統2027年預算案可能砍掉42,000弱勢長者就業培訓項目
items.zh_point: 川普總統的2027年預算案將砍掉一項為低收入長者提供就業培訓的項目，正當政府對福利金和醫療保險的工作要求加緊施行之際。

items.title: Super Micro stock plunges as $7 billion equity raise overshadows booming backlog
items.summary: Super Micro looks to raise equity as it faces staggering AI demand but also an intense cash burn
items.zh_title: 超微半導體股價大跌 美股7億美元籌資計畫掩蓋龐大訂單
items.zh_point: 超微半導體面臨龐大的AI需求，但同時也面臨嚴重的資金耗盡問題，公司決定籌集7億美元的股權以應對挑戰。

items.title: This stock-market strategy has cheap exposure to AI and points to an advantage for closed-end funds
items.summary: The fund is diversified and has been an excellent performer, highlighting the advantages of a closed-end structure.
items.zh_title: 這個股市策略讓你可以便宜買入AI股票，並指出封閉式基金的優勢
items.zh_point: 封閉式基金的優勢在於投資組合的多元化和投資績效的優異，展現封閉式基金的投資優勢。

items.title: Apple’s AI could usher in a historic upgrade cycle that investors are overlooking
items.summary: Apple’s new AI features are on track to be monetized faster than expected, thanks to increased hardware requirements and new “killer apps.”
items.zh_title: 蘋果的AI可能引發歷史性的升級週期，投資人正在忽略這一點
items.zh_point: 蘋果的新AI功能預計將比投資人預期的更快地被盈利化，主要是由於硬件需求的增加和新的「殺手級」應用程式。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 股票大跌：美股全面下跌，AI產業受重創
items.zh_point: 美股大幅下跌，NVIDIA等AI基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，多家公司股價跌幅超過10%，NVIDIA股價跌幅達16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: Comex金、銀結束下跌
items.zh_point: Comex金價下跌1.4%，連續兩次下跌；Comex銀價下跌2.5%，連續三次下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興企業宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，無需使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋求不會讓美國AI巨頭沉沒
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒可能過於誇大。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與電信周報：市場話題
items.zh_point: 深度尋、SoFi 等科技、媒體和電信領域的最新發展，包括市場分析和相關新聞。

items.title: Northern Emerging Markets Equity Index Fund  Q1 2026 Commentary
items.zh_title: 北方新興市場股權指數基金 Q1 2026 年評論
items.zh_point: 北方新興市場股權指數基金在 2026 年第一季度的表現評論，內容包括投資策略、市場分析和投資績效等方面的評估。

items.title: Walmart Inc. (WMT) Presents at Oppenheimer 26th Annual Consumer Growth and E-Commerce Conference Transcript
items.zh_title: 沃爾瑪公司 (WMT) 在 Oppenheimer 26 號年度消費者成長和電子商務會議上的發表記錄
items.zh_point: 沃爾瑪公司在電子商務會議上發表演說，可能與公司的電子商務發展策略相關。

items.title: Skillsoft Corp. 2027 Q1 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation
items.zh_title: Skillsoft Corp. 2027 Q1 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation
items.zh_point: Skillsoft Corp. 2027 年第一季度財報發布，內容包括財務報告和財務分析會議簡報。

items.title: PGIM Jennison Value Fund Q1 2026 Commentary
items.zh_title: PGIM Jennison Value Fund 2026 年第一季度評論
items.zh_point: PGIM Jennison Value Fund 在 2026 年第一季度的投資表現。

items.title: Nationwide Loomis Short Term Bond Fund Q1 2026 Commentary
items.zh_title: 全國洛米斯短期債券基金 2026 年第一季度評論
items.zh_point: 洛米斯短期債券基金在 2026 年第一季度的表現將在評論中詳細介紹。

items.title: Trump administration urges judge to reject bid to block White House UFC event
items.zh_title: 特朗普政府要求法官駁回阻止白宮UFC活動的申請
items.zh_point: 特朗普政府要求法官駁回阻止白宮舉辦UFC活動的申請，理由可能與活動的安全或合法性有關。

items.title: US House passes $70 billion bill to fund ICE, Border Patrol
items.zh_title: 美國眾議院通過 700 億美元法案支持ICE、邊境巡警
items.zh_point: 美國眾議院通過一項700億美元的法案，旨在資助美國移民和海關執法局（ICE）和邊境巡警的運作。

items.title: China’s May factory-gate prices climb to highest in nearly 4 years
items.zh_title: 中國五月份製造業出廠價格升至近四年來最高
items.zh_point: 中國五月份製造業出廠價格大幅上升，創近四年來最高水平，可能對全球經濟產生影響。

items.title: Japan’s Asics to spin off Onitsuka Tiger business
items.zh_title: asics將分拆Onitsuka Tiger業務
items.zh_point: asics決定將旗下知名運動鞋品牌Onitsuka Tiger分拆成獨立公司，據悉此舉旨在強化品牌獨立性和市場競爭力。

items.title: OpenAI weighs leasing Ohio data center with Nvidia backing, The Information reports
items.zh_title: OpenAI考慮租用俄亥俄州資料中心，Nvidia提供支持，The Information 報導
items.zh_point: OpenAI可能會與Nvidia合作，租用俄亥俄州一座資料中心，為其人工智能業務提供更多資源和支持。
